name: b. Patisserie
tagline: San Francisco's award-winning French bakery lands in Honolulu — the kouign-amann and cruffins are worth every calorie.
mustOrder: kouign-amann — the signature, caramelized butter pastry
cruffin — croissant-muffin hybrid with seasonal fillings
parking: International Market Place validated parking on Kuhio Ave side
talkStory: Belinda Leong, who trained under Pierre Herme in Paris, opened b. Patisserie in San Francisco in 2013 and earned a James Beard nomination for Outstanding Pastry Chef. Her Honolulu outpost brings the same exacting standards -- the kouign-amann uses 72 layers of laminated dough and took two years to perfect. The cruffin (her invention) went viral and spawned imitators worldwide. Every pastry here is engineered with a precision that borders on obsessive.
